title: Evelyn Aucoin
compiled_truth: Evelyn Aucoin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-02-13), Evelyn Aucoin sent 4 and received 143 emails, totalling 147 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (2), [Kimberly Hundl](people/kimberly-hundl) (2), [Ann Murphy](people/ann-murphy) (2), [Mike Carson](people/mike-carson) (1), [Doug Sewell](people/doug-sewell) (1). Mailbox folders observed: inbox, koch.
